texto: A further, albeit more complex, possibility is that our conscious selves might suffer from characteristic uncertainty about our true values, and gather information about them from choices we make (the Jamesian: "How do I know what I like until I see what I pick").
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tali Sharot: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “A further, albeit more complex, possibility is that our conscious selves might suffer from charac…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, choices, self pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de self e values.
